theme: 不可能建筑里的居住日常

items.title: 违反重力的厨房早餐
items.description: 一家人在多重重力方向的厨房里平静做早饭，仿佛这只是普通清晨。
items.prompt: Horizontal cinematic editorial image, ordinary family daily life inside impossible architecture. A cozy apartment kitchen whose floor, ceiling, and wall cabinets meet at impossible angles like a mathematical optical illusion, gravity points in three directions, yet a calm parent in slippers fries eggs on a sideways stove while a child pours milk at a table attached to a vertical wall, another family member reads messages. The drama is that everyone acts completely used to it. Warm morning light, lived-in details, dishes, schoolbag, kettle steam, crumbs, realistic documentary photography blended with subtle impossible-geometry architecture, no spectacle, no chaos, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 莫比乌斯走廊里遛狗
items.description: 一家人沿着自我翻转的公寓走廊遛狗，神情像每天晚饭后的例行散步。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic documentary scene: a family casually walking a small dog through a Mobius-strip apartment corridor. The corridor loops back into itself with one continuous twisted floor and ceiling, doors on both sides at impossible orientations, laundry baskets and slippers placed naturally along the path. A parent holds the leash, a child follows with a juice box, the dog sniffs a corner that is also the ceiling. Everyone is relaxed and bored, as if this is the usual evening walk. Soft apartment hallway fluorescent light, ordinary residential textures, understated impossible geometry, not a fantasy spectacle, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 三向重力里的晾衣日
items.description: 衣服、夹子和洗衣盆分布在墙面、天花板和楼梯上，家人只关心衣服会不会干。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic image: impossible apartment laundry day. A normal family calmly hangs wet clothes on clotheslines that run across three connected wall planes with different gravity directions; socks hang upward, shirts dry along a ceiling staircase, a washing machine sits on a landing that loops into the kitchen. A grandmother clips a towel above her head, a child passes clothespins from a sideways balcony, a parent folds laundry at a table. Their expressions are practical and routine. Muted afternoon light, ordinary Chinese apartment details, potted plants, plastic basin, detergent bottle without logo, subtle optical-illusion architecture, everyday mood, no readable text.

items.title: 竖墙书桌旁写作业
items.description: 孩子在垂直墙面上的书桌前写作业，家长跨着另一个重力面检查答案。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary image: a quiet impossible apartment living room during homework time. A child sits at a desk mounted on a vertical wall, doing math homework calmly; a parent on a sofa on the opposite gravity plane checks the answers; another person waters a plant growing from the ceiling. Shelves, books, slippers, remote control, snack plate, pencil shavings make it feel ordinary. The room uses impossible perspective: stairs ascend and descend into the same doorway, windows face conflicting horizons. Warm evening lamp light, realistic lived-in home, understated optical illusion, emotional focus on routine acceptance, no readable text, no logos.

items.title: 通勤前等一部反向电梯
items.description: 电梯门开向同时向上和向下的楼梯，家人只是在疲惫地等上班上学。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic scene: morning commute in an impossible apartment building. A family waits calmly for an elevator whose doors open onto a staircase that is both above and below; one parent holds a work bag, a child ties shoelaces on an upside-down step, a neighbor carries trash, a small dog sits patiently. The hallway has old tiles, mailboxes, umbrellas, shoe racks, dim natural light. Architectural geometry is subtly impossible: repeated landings fold into each other, railings connect to wrong floors. The mood is mundane and slightly tired, not amazed. Documentary photography, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 折叠楼层里的晚饭准备
items.description: 切菜、盛饭和摆碗发生在互相垂直的地面上，但一家人的节奏仍然平稳。
items.prompt: Horizontal editorial documentary image: ordinary dinner preparation in an impossible split-level apartment. A parent chops vegetables at a kitchen counter on one wall plane, another person sets bowls on a table on a perpendicular floor, a child carries rice across a staircase that loops back into the pantry. Steam, soy sauce bottle without label, cutting board, slippers, homework papers, plastic stool. The impossible architecture is precise but treated as normal family logistics. Warm kitchen light, realistic textures, calm domestic rhythm, no wonder, no fantasy glow, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 错位楼梯间倒垃圾
items.description: 邻居和少年沿着横向翻折的楼梯倒垃圾，认真的是别把袋子弄破。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic documentary photo: taking out trash in an impossible residential stairwell. An elderly neighbor and a teenager casually carry garbage bags along stairs that turn sideways and reappear overhead, a recycling bin sits on a vertical landing, pipes and meters run through contradictory planes. Nobody looks surprised; they are focused on not spilling the trash. Ordinary apartment details: worn tiles, dim bulbs, door mats, slippers, plants, peeling paint. Impossible geometry should be clear but domestic and slightly inconvenient, not grand. Natural low light, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 横向水流里的刷牙
items.description: 狭小浴室里水沿墙面流向侧面的地漏，家人照常刷牙找毛巾。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic interior scene: impossible bathroom morning routine. A cramped tiled family bathroom where the sink, shower, mirror, and towel rack sit on different gravity planes; water flows neatly along a sideways wall into a drain, and a parent calmly brushes teeth while a child looks for a towel on a ceiling shelf. A bath mat, plastic stool, shampoo bottles without logos, fogged mirror, toothbrush cup, ordinary clutter. The impossible spatial logic is clear but everyone uses it without comment. Soft steam, domestic realism, understated humor, no readable text.

items.title: 相邻墙面上的睡前时间
items.description: 两张床分属不同重力面，家长仍然自然地给孩子掖被角。
items.prompt: Horizontal cinematic but mundane bedroom scene inside impossible architecture. A family gets ready for sleep in a room where two beds are on adjacent walls with different gravity, a nightstand is shared across an impossible corner, and a ceiling fan appears below one bed. A parent tucks in a child who is sideways relative to the camera, another person adjusts an alarm clock, slippers and books lie naturally on each gravity plane. Everyone is sleepy and normal, not amazed. Warm bedside lamp, realistic apartment bedroom, subtle optical-illusion geometry, quiet domestic feeling, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 倒着漏水的管道维修
items.description: 水管沿着上升又下降的楼梯漏水，家人用手电和胶带熟练处理。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic scene: a parent repairing a leaky pipe in an impossible apartment ceiling-floor junction. The pipe runs along a stair that descends upward, with a bucket placed on a sideways ledge catching drips; a child hands over tape from another gravity plane, a family member holds a flashlight while standing on a wall. Ordinary home repair mood: tools, towel, plastic basin, water marks, old paint. Everyone looks mildly annoyed and competent, not amazed. Lived-in residential realism, impossible geometry visible but practical, soft indoor light, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 给天花板窗台浇花
items.description: 花盆跨越地面、墙面和天花板，浇水的人只是在照顾家里的绿植。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic documentary image: watering houseplants in impossible architecture. A grandmother calmly waters potted plants arranged on windowsills that wrap across floor, wall, and ceiling; water falls along three different gravity directions but lands cleanly in saucers. A child sits nearby eating breakfast, a parent opens curtains on a window facing a contradictory sky. Ordinary domestic details: plastic watering can, soil, slippers, newspaper shapes with no readable text, balcony rail. The impossible space is subtle and lived-in, everyone treats it as routine. Morning natural light, warm realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 从天花板门口收快递
items.description: 快递员从天花板方向递来纸箱，双方都像处理一次普通签收。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic scene: receiving a package in an impossible apartment entryway. A courier hands a parcel through a door that opens from the ceiling into the family's hallway; a parent signs calmly while standing on a sideways landing, a child peeks from an upside-down stair, shoes and umbrellas are stored on multiple gravity planes. The courier also acts like this is normal. Ordinary residential lighting, door mats, parcel tape, plain boxes with no logos or readable labels. Impossible architecture is clean and believable, the mood is everyday errand, no spectacle.

items.title: 彭罗斯楼梯上的早餐收拾
items.description: 餐桌和水槽被无尽楼梯连接起来，家人像平常一样收碗擦桌。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic image: ordinary breakfast cleanup in a Penrose-stair apartment dining area. A family clears bowls after breakfast while the table sits at the intersection of stairs that loop endlessly; one person carries dishes up a stair that returns under the sink, another wipes crumbs from a vertical tabletop, a child feeds a cat on a sideways landing. The cat and family are completely used to the spatial contradiction. Morning light, small apartment, ceramic bowls, rice cooker, dish towel, school backpack, domestic clutter, precise impossible staircase geometry, no spectacle, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 反向客厅里的晚间电视
items.description: 沙发、电视和扶手椅分处不同平面，但一家人只是安静地看节目吃水果。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic documentary scene: a family watching TV in an impossible living room. The sofa is on one wall plane, the television is on another plane that should be the floor, and a grandparent knits from an upside-down armchair; a child lies on a rug that bends into a vertical stair. Everyone casually watches a plain glowing screen, eating fruit and sunflower seeds. The architecture forms a calm optical illusion, with doorways opening into contradictory rooms. Ordinary evening apartment atmosphere, warm lamp and TV light, lived-in details, no readable text, no logos, not surreal fantasy, just accepted daily life.

items.title: 折叠阳台上的家务
items.description: 阳台翻到另一层楼的背面，家人仍然在晒毯子、浇香草和拖地。
items.prompt: Horizontal realistic image: an impossible apartment balcony used for normal chores. A parent shakes out a rug on a balcony that folds into the underside of another balcony; a child waters herbs growing sideways; a grandparent clips blankets to a railing that loops back into the living room. City apartment blocks visible through windows with conflicting horizons. Everyone is calm and practical. Domestic objects: laundry clips, mop, buckets, slippers, plastic stools, drying rack. Architecture should feel like an impossible optical-illusion building but worn and inhabited. Daylight, documentary realism, no readable text, no logos.
